name: oracledb
description: Connect, query, and interact with Oracle Databases and their data within Gemini CLI.

settings.name: Connection String
settings.description: Oracle connection string (e.g., host:port/service_name or TNS alias)

settings.name: Wallet Path
settings.description: (Optional) Path to the Oracle Wallet directory

settings.name: Use OCI
settings.description: (Optional) Set to true to use the OCI (thick client) driver (Default: false)
